meaning: n.马车,客车,运费,姿态,(机械)车架
examples: I fought my way into a carriage just before the doors closed.
Again, buyers need to check if carriage is included in the price.
For much of the journey however, the appeal lies inside the carriage rather than outside the window.
Barry Liffen, chairman of the Wellingborough Hackney Carriage Association, said the group welcomed the changes.
